## Epic 3 — Skills & Talents (#31)

**Dependency:** #30
**Est. Effort:** Small

### Goal
Design the Novice/Adept/Master skill tier system.

### Tier Structure
| Tier | Bonus | DP Cost | Prerequisite |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| **Novice** | +1 | 1 DP (class-favored) or 2-4 DP (cross-class) | None |
| **Adept** | +2 | 2 DP (class-favored) or 3-6 DP (cross-class) | Novice in skill |
| **Master** | +3 | 4 DP (class-favored) or 6-8 DP (cross-class) | Adept in skill |

### Design Questions
- Is there a "Grandmaster" tier (+4) or does it cap at Master (+3)?
- Can you be Novice in some skills and Master in others simultaneously?
- What's the narrative distinction between tiers? (trained vs expert vs legendary?)
- Do tiers unlock new abilities or just improve the bonus?

### Tasks
- [ ] Define tier descriptions (what does each tier mean narratively?)
- [ ] Define skill tier progression table
- [ ] Define tier unlocking rules (if Adept/Master unlock special abilities)
- [ ] Write tier rules as AsciiDoc section
